description: Memorial lists from the Qaraite community of Cairo. Dating: Late 17th century or 18th century. There are 9 pages. Includes entries for the תוריזי family (Tawrizi?); Mann suggested that this family originated in Tabriz. This document is discussed by Haggai Ben-Shammai in "New Sources for the History of the Karaites in Sixteenth-Century Egypt (A Preliminary Description)" (Hebrew), Ginzei Qedem 2 (2006), pp. 97–101.
description_he: רשימות זיכרון מקהילת הקראים בקהיר. תיארוך: סוף המאה ה-17 או מאה ה-18. 9 עמודים. כולל ערכים למשפחת תוריזי (מטבריז?).
